# uuid.airat.top

Summary:
UUID.airat.top is a static, privacy-first UUID generator with v4 and v7 support, including single and batch output (1 to 10,000). Everything runs locally in the browser using secure randomness.

Primary URL:
https://uuid.airat.top

Key features:
- UUID v4 and UUID v7 generation with batch output from 1 to 10,000 values.
- Quick version switcher (v4 random or v7 time-ordered).
- Default version is v4.
- One-click copy, regenerate, and TXT download actions.
- Local settings persistence for count and version.

Tech stack:
HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript.

Privacy:
No history or analytics; only local settings are stored. All generation happens locally.

Contact:
AiratTop - mail@airat.top
